connections.gloss: (adulter) ess, each, every, female, [idiom] many, [phrase] none, one, [phrase] together, wife, woman. Often unexpressed in English.

connections.def: probably from the base of 1096; a woman; specially, a wife:--wife, woman. see GREEK for

connections.gloss: behold (by mistake for H7789 (שׁוּר)), sing(-er, -ing man, -ing woman).

connections.def: including the comparative neoteros neh-o'-ter-os; a primary word; "new", i.e. (of persons) youthful, or (of things) fresh; figuratively, regenerate:--new,
